# Decision Clarity Kit

> A printable PDF and Markdown decision workbook for turning hard choices into written decisions, next actions, and review dates.

Decision Clarity Kit is a $9 digital workbook for people who keep replaying the same decision in their head. It is designed for solo founders, managers, career decisions, and teams that need a lightweight decision log.

Important links:

- Product page: https://dewwjq.github.io/decision-clarity-kit/
- Buy or request checkout: https://dewwjq.github.io/decision-clarity-kit/buy.html
- Public launch issue: https://github.com/dewwjq/decision-clarity-kit/issues/1
- Free browser tool: https://dewwjq.github.io/decision-clarity-kit/decision-reset-tool.html
- Filled decision example: https://dewwjq.github.io/decision-clarity-kit/examples/filled-decision-example.html
- Free English sample: https://github.com/dewwjq/decision-clarity-kit/releases/download/sample-v0.1/decision-reset-sample-v0.1.zip
- Free Chinese sample: https://github.com/dewwjq/decision-clarity-kit/releases/download/sample-v0.1/decision-reset-sample-zh-v0.1.zip
- Full reference for AI readers: https://dewwjq.github.io/decision-clarity-kit/llms-full.txt

The full kit includes:

- 20-page printable English workbook
- 20-page printable Chinese workbook
- Markdown templates for notes apps
- Filled English and Chinese example decision records
- Option scorecard
- Premortem worksheet
- Action bridge
- 7-day and 30-day review pages
- Local browser decision tracker with CSV/JSON export

Use it when:

- A decision keeps looping in your head
- You need to compare serious options without pretending certainty
- You want a written record before hindsight changes the story
- You want one next action and a review date

Boundary:

This is a self-guided reflection tool. It is not financial, legal, medical, therapy, career counseling, or mental health advice.
